The '''Abran asteroid belt''', or simply the '''Abran Belt''', was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|field]] located in the [[Abran system]] of the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. It contained the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony [[B'Knos]].<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==History==
It was [[Raid on B'Knos colony|attacked]] by the [[Ssi-ruuvi]] when they invaded neighboring systems.<ref name="TBSB" />
